llm_result.summary: The case presents a pattern of heightened sensory reactivity to ambient noise with rapid urges to escape, avoidance of noisy contexts, physiological hyperarousal, cognitive overload, concerns about social invalidation, and functional impairment. Modifiable levers span bio (sensory regulation, sleep, environment), psycho (exposure, cognitive restructuring, skills training), and social (accommodation, support, communication) domains, including their interactions. A staged approach combining graded exposure, arousal regulation, cognitive reframing, environmental adjustments, sleep optimization, activity engagement, social supports, and mindfulness-based grounding is proposed to reduce noise tolerance thresholds, decrease urge-to-escape and avoidance, dampen hyperarousal and cognitive overload, and restore daily functioning. Measurements are simple, scalable, and aligned with each lever to track progress over approximately 6–12 weeks. Priorities emphasize high-impact, feasible strategies with safety considerations for gradual implementation.

solutions.predictor_variable: Graded auditory exposure with sensory regulation and social communication planning
solutions.solution_candidate: Graded noise exposure protocol combined with sensory-regulation skills and proactive social-communication strategies (e.g., requesting quieter settings, planning breaks)
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Gradual exposure promotes habituation to noise, reducing threshold for tolerating ambient sound; sensory regulation lowers immediate arousal; planning and communication reduce distress and avoidance by clarifying needs.
solutions.measurement: Noise tolerance rating (0–10) in progressively noisier settings; urge-to-escape rating (0–10); weekly avoidance episodes; subjective hyperarousal rating (0–10); daily functioning log (e.g., shopping/tasks completed); social-response quality (0–10)
solutions.safety_notes: Proceed with careful pacing; monitor for panic symptoms; provide opt-out options and professional support if distress escalates.

solutions.predictor_variable: Arousal-regulation skills training (diaphragmatic breathing, grounding, affect regulation)
solutions.solution_candidate: Teach and practice diaphragmatic breathing, grounding techniques, and affect regulation to reduce physiological arousal during exposure
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Regulated breathing and grounding reduce autonomic arousal and cognitive flooding, leading to lower perceived noise distress and improved processing
solutions.measurement: Arousal rating during tasks (0–10); frequency of skill use; state anxiety scale (short form or 0–10); self-reported cognitive clarity (0–10)
solutions.safety_notes: Ensure correct technique; no contraindications; encourage practice in safe settings before real-world exposure.

solutions.predictor_variable: Cognitive restructuring to reduce perceived social invalidation and threat appraisal
solutions.solution_candidate: Cognitive restructuring to reframe others’ reactions as context-driven rather than personal invalidation; integrate with threat appraisal and coping
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Altering interpretation of social cues lowers social threat, reduces cognitive load during exposure, and lessens distress responses
solutions.measurement: Perceived social judgment scale (0–10); cognitive flexibility index; distress in social settings (0–10)
solutions.safety_notes: Monitor for rumination; adjust pacing if increases distress or negative self-referential thinking.

solutions.predictor_variable: Environmental sensory accommodations and personal noise-reduction tools
solutions.solution_candidate: Use sensory-friendly spaces (shopping windows) and personal noise reduction (ear protection, quiet modes) to lower ambient load
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Reducing external auditory load and providing control over the environment decreases distress, lowers avoidance, and supports participation
solutions.measurement: Weekly count of visits to sensory-friendly settings; self-reported noise tolerance (0–10); avoidance frequency
solutions.safety_notes: Coordinate with venues for accessibility; ensure comfort and safety in use of devices.

solutions.predictor_variable: Sleep and circadian optimization for arousal regulation
solutions.solution_candidate: Structured sleep hygiene program with consistent schedule, light exposure, and circadian alignment
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Improved sleep quality and circadian alignment reduce baseline hyperarousal and cognitive overwhelm, supporting better functioning in noisy contexts
solutions.measurement: Sleep duration/quality (diary or brief PSQI or 0–10 scale); daytime functioning; distress during exposure
solutions.safety_notes: If sleep disorders are suspected, consult a clinician; avoid unsafe sleep aids.

solutions.predictor_variable: Structured behavioral activation with graded exposure to daily tasks
solutions.solution_candidate: Systematic re-engagement in shopping, meals, and social activities with graded exposure and supports
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Re-engagement reduces avoidance, improves daily functioning, and lowers distress in common noisy contexts through practice and mastery
solutions.measurement: Activities engaged per week; time in noisy contexts with manageable distress (0–10); task completion rate
solutions.safety_notes: Progression should be slow and customizable; monitor for overload and adjust pacing.

solutions.predictor_variable: Social support and accommodations via coaching and social prescribing
solutions.solution_candidate: Coaching in requesting accommodations, building supportive networks, and linking to community resources
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Enhanced support and accepted accommodations reduce perceived invalidation, broaden participation, and reduce functional impairment
solutions.measurement: Perceived social support scale; weekly social participation count; distress in social/meal settings
solutions.safety_notes: Respect boundaries; obtain consent for sharing information with third parties; ensure privacy.

solutions.predictor_variable: Mindfulness-based sensory grounding to reduce reactivity
solutions.solution_candidate: Mindfulness-based interventions emphasizing body-sensory grounding during noisy exposure
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Mindfulness fosters nonreactive awareness of sensory input, dampening hypervigilance and cognitive overload during exposure
solutions.measurement: Mindfulness attention/disentanglement scale; distress during exposure (0–10); functional rating (0–10)
solutions.safety_notes: Typically safe; provide guided instruction to avoid misapplication; ensure proper facilitation.
